title: ilex oligoneura
intro: Ilex oligoneura is a plant species belonging to the holly family (Aquifoliaceae) that is native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ilex oligoneura include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Ilex oligoneura can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
